Off Calendar Mar-24-2025 Continued To Apr-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard together:
PTR-24-306980, Survivor's Trust under Abdul Khan & Hajra Khan Joint Trust
PTR-24-306982, Exemption Trust under Abdul Khan & Hajra Khan Joint Trust

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Rowena Navia to appear on April 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear. Both matters are continued to that date.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Continued To Feb-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together:
PTR-24-306980, Survivor's Trust under Abdul Khan & Hajra Khan Joint Trust
PTR-24-306982, Exemption Trust under Abdul Khan & Hajra Khan Joint Trust

Appearances:
Rowena Navia for Adnan Khan, Successor Trustee (via Zoom).

Ms. Navia reported that the accounting was received just before Christmas break and requested 45 days to complete the review and prepare. The court continued both matters to February 24, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 for further updates.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

First And Final Account And Report Of Former Successor Trustee, Petition For Its Settlement, For Allowance Of Compensation To Former Successor Trustee And Her Attorneys, For Discharge Of Bond; And For Discharge Of Trustee
Off Calendar May-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-18-302064 Conservatorship of Hajra N. Kahn;
PTR-18-302065 The Abdul Aziz Kahn and Hajra Nighat Khan Joint Living Trust;
PTR-24-306980 The Survivor's Trust Created Under The Abdul Aziz Kahn and Hajra Nighat Khan Joint Living Trust;
PTR-24-306982 The Exemption Trust Created Under The Abdul Aziz Kahn and Hajra Nighat Khan Joint Living Trust

Appearances: Marta Eisenberg appeared by zoom for Debra Dolch (former conservator of the estate and former trustee).

Mrs. Eisenberg confirmed that Mrs. Dolch has transferred all of the assets to Adnan Khan, stated that she has not heard from any of the children regarding any issues of the accounting and that her client and Mr. Khan are in communication. The Third and Final Account and Report of Former Conservator of the Estate, etc., the Third and Final Account and Report of Former Successor Trustee, etc. (joint living trust), the First and Final Account and Report of Successor Trustee, etc. (survivor's trust), and the First and Final Account and Report of Successor Trustee, etc. (exemption trust) are under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.
